kw.name: Criar Sessao
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=serverest, url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Cria uma sessão para a API ServeRest utilizando a URL base definida nas variáveis:

test.name: CT-A01 Login válido

kw.name: Gerar Email Aleatorio
Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Gera um email aleatório para uso nos testes de criação de usuários:

kw.name: Criar Usuario
Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '107', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "User Login", "email": "user_XqFGG@email.com", "password": "password123", "administrador": "true"}'

C:\Users\danis\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'compassuol.serverest.dev'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Cria um usuário utilizando um nome, email, senha e status de administrador, retornando a resposta da requisição:

kw.name: Realizar Login
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '60', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "user_XqFGG@email.com", "password": "password123"}'

C:\Users\danis\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'compassuol.serverest.dev'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Realiza o login na API ServeRest utilizando email e senha, retornando a resposta da requisição:

kw.name: Validar Login Sucesso
Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
Valida se o login foi realizado com sucesso, através do status code da resposta:

test.doc: Testa o login com credenciais válidas

test.name: CT-A02 Login inválido

kw.name: Validar Contrato Login
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Start With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not start with the string ``str2``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Valida os elementos do contrato da resposta do login, verificando a presença de 'message' e 'authorization':

test.doc: Valida o contrato da resposta do login
